---
title: "visualisation"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(naniar)
library(dplyr)

data_eng_processed <- read.csv("data/processed_translation_data_3.csv")
data_eng_processed <- data_eng_processed |> select(-X, -id)
```


```{r}
vis_miss(data_eng_processed, warn_large_data = F)
```

```{r}
gg_miss_upset(data_eng_processed)
```

```{r}
gg_miss_fct(x = data_eng_processed, fct = publication_type)
```
```{r}
gg_miss_fct(x = data_eng_processed, fct = target_audience)
```
